videos.headline: Nathan Kent makes an impressive TD grab for Navy
videos.description: Nathan Kent hauls in the dime from Tai Lavatai to pad Navy's lead.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Nathan Kent makes an impressive TD grab for Navy) 2023/10/07 ESHEET

videos.headline: Alex Tecza gives Navy a lead with a 39-yard rushing TD
videos.description: Alex Tecza outruns North Texas' defense for a 39-yard rushing touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play ( Alex Tecza gives Navy a lead with a 39-yard rushing TD) 2023/10/07 ESHEET

videos.headline: Chandler Rogers takes the QB keeper 75 yards to the crib
videos.description: Chandler Rogers turns on the jets and outruns Navy's defense for a 75-yard rushing touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Chandler Rogers takes the QB keeper 75 yards to the crib) 2023/10/07 ESHEET
